post.summary: Step 1: Submit a draft certification request
Step 2: Start document review
Step 3: Schedule a field inspection
Step 4: Inspector starts the field visit
Step 5: Inspector files the inspection report
Step 6: Send batch to lab testing
Step 8: Start final review of lab results
Step 12: Renew a granted certification
